---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement to the public docs or site behavior
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature.

## Problem It Solves

What is currently difficult or impossible that this would fix?

## Proposed Solution

How you imagine it working. Include page, navigation, or content examples if relevant.

## Affected Layer

Which part of the site does this touch?

- [ ] Content / architecture pages
- [ ] Navigation / information architecture
- [ ] Styling / layout
- [ ] Build / preview setup
- [ ] Public-safe wording / boundary doctrine

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches and why you ruled them out.

## Additional Context

Related issues, docs pages, or prior discussion.
